## PrivaCI v0.1.0-beta.6

Plugin extension hooks for subsetting and JSONB path masking, plus a capability
test harness with masking-confidence reports.

### Highlights

- `RunEnhancer` contract hook for licensed plugin extensions.
- `privaci detect-drift` and `privaci preview` CLI entry points.
- Capability test harness (`scripts/capability-test*.sh`) with scope-aware reports.
- Integration masking audit (leak probes, value-free verify, SpaCy hard gate).
- Streaming: binary COPY honors row filters; skipped when cell post-processing is required.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:0.1.0-beta.6
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:beta    # rolling beta head

helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 0.1.0-beta.6

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v0.1.0-beta.6"
```

Docs: https://boundarylogic.github.io/privaci/

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
